items.title: Arteta named Premier League Manager of the Season
items.summary: Mikel Arteta has been named the Premier League Manager of the Season.

items.title: Vardy leaves Cremonese but wants to continue career
items.summary: Former Leicester striker Jamie Vardy has decided to leave Cremonese when his contract expires this summer.

items.title: Arsenal target Villa's Rogers - Wednesday's gossip
items.summary: Arsenal ready to target Morgan Rogers, Paris St-Germain to rival Liverpool for Yan Diomande and Jack Grealish to be given chance to revive Man City career.

items.title: Adams & Robinson in US squad for World Cup
items.summary: Mauricio Pochettino includes Bournemouth midfielder Tyler Adams and Fulham left-back Antonee Robinson in his USA squad for the World Cup.

items.title: World Cup: Every squad as they are announced
items.summary: Every squad for the 2026 World Cup in the US, Canada and Mexico as they are announced.

items.title: Spurs conduct major review to address 'astronomical' injury problems
items.summary: Spurs have carried out a major review of their performance and medical departments, which included an investigation into whether the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium's retractable pitch is contributing to the club's ongoing injury crisis.

items.title: Spurs launch review after season of injury woe
items.summary: Tottenham will launch a review focusing on the "unusual" spate of anterior cruciate ligament injuries recently suffered by key players.

items.title: PSG's Hakimi in Morocco squad despite injury
items.summary: Morocco captain Achraf Hakimi is named in the Atlas Lions' World Cup squad despite the injury he sustained in the Champions League semi-finals against Bayern Munich.

items.title: Norwich's Cordoba in Panama's World Cup squad
items.summary: Norwich City defender Jose Cordoba is the only UK-based player in Panama's squad for the 2026 World Cup.
